conditional_scale_mode.activation_rule: Activate only after a bounded vertical slice demonstrates a real end-to-end loop, recorded tests, value signal, evidence route, bounded risk/cost and human-approved scale decision.
conditional_scale_mode.truth_boundary: APEX 1M is a conditional scaled-iteration mode; it does not authorize literal one-million execution, production deployment, external writes or unbounded cost without explicit approved scope.

initial_vertical_slice_candidates.scope: One module node → detail drawer → direction selection → exported task packet → evidence record
initial_vertical_slice_candidates.benefit_tested: Whether the APEX Development Console can guide controlled module work visibly and truthfully.

initial_vertical_slice_candidates.scope: One matched learning task tested across Human-only, AI-only and Human+AI conditions
initial_vertical_slice_candidates.benefit_tested: Whether Human+AI improves the selected learning result within the bounded pilot.

initial_vertical_slice_candidates.scope: One supported source input → OCODE operational map → web target candidate → behavior comparison receipt
initial_vertical_slice_candidates.benefit_tested: Whether the first bridging-code path preserves defined expected behavior within scope.

recommended_first_slice.reason: It operationalizes the on-screen APEX Development map and provides visible status, direction choice and evidence routing for every later module slice.

final_direction_stack.direction: Execute VS-DEV-CONSOLE-001 as the first proof-bearing vertical slice.
final_direction_stack.gate: Clickable module-to-task-packet flow passes named tests and records evidence.

final_direction_stack.direction: Add VVSF and scale-eligibility fields to the interactive console prototype.
final_direction_stack.gate: All active module cards render the required state fields without unsupported scale claims.

final_direction_stack.direction: Create the standardized vertical-slice evidence receipt schema in the Evidence Ledger.
final_direction_stack.gate: Receipt validates before any module is shown as scale candidate.

final_direction_stack.direction: Sandbox a visual evidence-lit bridge that illuminates scale readiness only as gates are proven.
